use 0
  have h1 : p.nth 0 = p := by
    simp [Position.nth]
  have h2 : (p.nth 0).swapped 0 = (p ((p.symm 0) - 1), p ((p.symm 0) + 1)) := by
    simp [h1, Position.swapped]
  have h3 : p ((p.symm 0) - 1) ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    have h4 : p ((p.symm 0) - 1) = 0 := by
      exact h
    have h5 : p (p.symm 0) = 0 := by
      have h6 : p (p.symm 0) = 0 := by
        have h7 : p.symm 0 = (p.symm 0 : Fin 2021) := by rfl
        have h8 : p (p.symm 0) = 0 := by
          have h9 : p.symm 0 = (p.symm 0 : Fin 2021) := by rfl
          simp [Equiv.symm_apply_self] at *
          <;> try { tauto }
        exact h8
      exact h6
    have h6 : (p.symm 0) - 1 = p.symm 0 := by
      have h7 : p ((p.symm 0) - 1) = p (p.symm 0) := by
        rw [h4, h5]
      have h8 : (p.symm 0) - 1 = p.symm 0 := by
        have h9 : p ((p.symm 0) - 1) = p (p.symm 0) := h7
        have h10 : (p.symm 0) - 1 = p.symm 0 := by
          exact p.injective h9
        exact h10
      exact h8
    have h7 : (p.symm 0) - 1 = p.symm 0 := h6
    have h8 : (p.symm 0).val - 1 = (p.symm 0).val := by
      have h9 : (p.symm 0 - 1 : Fin 2021) = (p.symm 0 : Fin 2021) := by
        exact_mod_cast h7
      have h10 : (p.symm 0).val - 1 = (p.symm 0).val := by
        have h11 : (p.symm 0 - 1 : Fin 2021) = (p.symm 0 : Fin 2021) := h9
        simp [Fin.val_sub] at h11 ⊢
        all_goals omega
      exact h10
    omega
  have h4 : p ((p.symm 0) + 1) ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    have h5 : p ((p.symm 0) + 1) = 0 := by
      exact h
    have h6 : p (p.symm 0) = 0 := by
      have h7 : p (p.symm 0) = 0 := by
        have h8 : p.symm 0 = (p.symm 0 : Fin 2021) := by rfl
        have h9 : p (p.symm 0) = 0 := by
          have h10 : p.symm 0 = (p.symm 0 : Fin 2021) := by rfl
          simp [Equiv.symm_apply_self] at *
          <;> try { tauto }
        exact h9
      exact h7
    have h7 : (p.symm 0) + 1 = p.symm 0 := by
      have h8 : p ((p.symm 0) + 1) = p (p.symm 0) := by
        rw [h5, h6]
      have h9 : (p.symm 0) + 1 = p
